# school-agenda-manager Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-03-22

## Active Technologies

- JavaScript (ES Modules), React 19.1.x, Node runtime compatible con Vite 7.x + React, React DOM, Vite, CSS global + componentes, react-markdown (sin cambios de alcance funcional) (001-homogeneizar-maquetado-frontend)

## Project Structure

```text
backend/
frontend/
tests/
```

## Commands

npm test && npm run lint

## Constitution Compliance

- Preserve domain constraints and solver correctness for all scheduling changes.
- Keep tests ahead of implementation for behavior and contract updates.
- Flag API/schema contract changes explicitly and list impacted consumers.
- Prefer reproducible project workflows and command conventions.

## Code Style

JavaScript (ES Modules), React 19.1.x, Node runtime compatible con Vite 7.x: Follow standard conventions
